response.justification: The candidate is a highly experienced full-stack and systems software engineer but lacks the domain-specific expertise required for this Principal Performance Architect role. There is no evidence of SoC/IP modeling, hardware-software co-design, GPU architecture, or performance optimization for AI accelerators and deep-learning workloads.
strengths: Over 15 years of software engineering experience across web, mobile, desktop, and embedded systems.
Proven ability to build low-latency, high-performance applications using DLang, C, and C++.
Strong foundation in system architecture, CI/CD, and test-driven development.
concerns: No experience with SoC and IP modeling or hardware-software co-design.
Lacks background in hardware optimization for AI accelerators and GPU architecture.
No demonstrated expertise in analyzing performance bottlenecks for deep-learning workloads.
